tasks.title: Live test development brief form on MochaHost
tasks.description: Submit the /development brief form on the live MojoAiStudio.com server and verify the full email flow: form submits successfully, confirmation page appears, admin email arrives at admin@MojoAiStudio.com with all submitted data, and auto-reply arrives at the submitter's inbox.

proofUnits.title: Form submits and confirmation page appears
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: Filling all required fields and clicking Submit redirects to /development/pages/confirmation.html with no errors.
proofUnits.exactCommand:
1. Open MojoAiStudio.com/development → click 'Start a project'
2. Fill: Project Name, Contact Name, Contact Email (use ravenshroud@gmail.com), Problem Description
3. Click Submit
4. DevTools Network tab → confirm POST /api/submit-brief returns 200 with {"ok":true}
5. Confirm browser redirects to /development/pages/confirmation.html
proofUnits.expectedInitialFailure: POST returns 500 or network error; page doesn't redirect.

proofUnits.title: Admin email and auto-reply both delivered
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: admin@MojoAiStudio.com receives brief email with all submitted fields; submitter receives auto-reply.
proofUnits.exactCommand:
1. After PU1 form submission
2. Check admin@MojoAiStudio.com inbox — confirm email with subject 'New Project Brief' containing submitted data
3. Check SPAM folder if not in inbox
4. Check ravenshroud@gmail.com inbox — confirm auto-reply received
5. Verify Reply-To on admin email points to submitter address
proofUnits.expectedInitialFailure: No email received; email in spam; fields missing from email body.
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: Both emails arrive in inbox with correct content and addressing.
proofUnits.waiverGuidance: If email goes to spam, note MochaHost server reputation issue and consider adding SPF/DKIM records.

tasks.title: Connect GAIN to Polar.sh and activate checkout buttons
tasks.description: Create GAIN products in the Polar.sh account (Pro $100/mo, Business $250/mo, Enterprise $500/mo), wire the plan-selector dialog's 'Start 14-day trial' CTAs to Polar checkout overlays by replacing the governainow.com direct links with Polar price IDs, and confirm the checkout overlay opens with the correct plan.

proofUnits.title: GAIN Pro/Business/Enterprise products exist in Polar.sh
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: Polar.sh dashboard shows 3 GAIN products with correct names and monthly prices.
proofUnits.exactCommand: Log in to polar.sh → Dashboard → Products. Confirm GAIN Pro ($100/mo), Business ($250/mo), Enterprise ($500/mo) all exist with Price IDs.

proofUnits.title: Polar checkout overlay opens from plan-selector dialog
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: Clicking 'Start 14-day trial' in the GAIN plan dialog opens the Polar checkout overlay for the selected plan.
proofUnits.exactCommand:
1. Open MojoAiStudio.com/products
2. Click 'Compare plans' → select Pro tab
3. Click 'Start 14-day trial'
4. Confirm Polar checkout overlay opens showing GAIN Pro at $100/mo
5. Repeat for Business and Enterprise tabs
6. Check browser console — no errors
proofUnits.expectedInitialFailure: Clicking CTA goes to governainow.com directly instead of Polar overlay.
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: Polar overlay opens for each plan with correct name and price.
proofUnits.waiverGuidance: Requires Polar.sh account credentials and price IDs.
